3294210.name: Maestro Level Editor
3294210.description:
Maestro Level Editor is the ultimate tool to bring your music to life. It serves both as a complete Virtual Symphony Orchestra Simulator and as a powerful Level Editor for creating content for Maestro VR and upcoming games in the Maestro saga by Symphonic Games.

  • Create Your Virtual Symphony Orchestra: Choose from multiple concert halls with unique acoustics and configure your ensemble. Edit each instrument track by track, loading your own audio files (MP3/OGG) to place them in 3D space. Use individual tracks (STEMS) for maximum control or simulate an orchestra from stereo recordings for a unique immersive journey.

  • Hybrid & Realistic Animation: Watch your virtual orchestra perform in real time. Animate musicians manually with drag-and-drop icons, or use the Smart Animation system to generate movements automatically from audio. For professional precision, import a MIDI file to sync bow strokes and fingerings with every note, and enjoy customizable lip-sync for the choir.

  • Create Levels for Maestro VR: Craft personalized rhythmic levels for Maestro VR. Use an intuitive interface with Smart Tempo tools to define conducting patterns, dynamics, and cues, designing your own symphonic challenges for the Virtual Reality game.

  • Share via Steam Workshop: Export your creations directly to the community. Share your original compositions as simulatable concerts for others to watch, or publish challenging gameplay levels for players to conduct.

  • Ideal for Composers and Gamers: Whether you want to visualize your own symphony or expand your game library, Maestro Level Editor allows you to simulate a realistic concert of your musical piece. It is the perfect bridge between music production and rhythm gaming.

Start creating, simulating, and sharing with Maestro Level Editor and take your passion for music to the next level!

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
